image_prompt: Infographic Q&A layout. Bold headline top: 'WRONG SIN = EMPTY SCHEDULE.' Left column dark navy: bold label 'HIGH VOLUME' with upward arrow icon, four 2-word category labels with green dots: 'IT Services', 'Pro Services', 'Cyber/AI', 'Construction'. Right column light background: bold label 'LOW RETURN' with flat arrow icon, two 2-word labels with yellow warning dots: 'Office Supplies', 'Niche Products'. Center: illustrated professional woman in blazer holding a magnifying glass over a contract document. Bottom callout box: 'CHECK USASPENDING.GOV FIRST'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
